subject: Gaming
title: Epic vs Apple: The Fortnite Fight
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: Epic vs Apple: The Fortnite Fight.

hook.text: Epic deliberately broke Apple's rules to trigger a lawsuit. The fight over app store monopolies went to court.

buildup.text: Apple takes a 30% cut from all App Store purchases. Epic called it an illegal monopoly.

discovery.text: Epic added a direct payment option to Fortnite, bypassing Apple. Apple removed Fortnite from the App Store.

twist.text: Epic had a lawsuit ready within minutes. They even prepared a parody ad. The whole thing was planned.

climax.text: The judge ruled Apple must allow alternative payment links but isn't a monopoly. Both sides claimed partial victory.

punchline.text: A planned provocation. A billion-dollar lawsuit. Both sides claimed they won.

quiz.question: What was Epic's strategy in the fight against Apple?
options: They deliberately broke Apple's rules to trigger a planned lawsuit
They politely requested a lower fee
They removed Fortnite from all platforms
